title: mirabilis californica var. aspera
intro: Mirabilis californica var. aspera, commonly known as California four o'clock or prickly four o'clock, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Mirabilis californica var. aspera include relief from skin irritations, wounds, and infections, as well as potential anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
